reviews.comment:
El pasado 13/01/19 ante una situacion en relacion al expendio de combustible solicite el libro de quejas. Me indicaron que el mismo no estaba disponible y que el encargado estaba ausente. Me dieron el numero de telefono y datos del encargado para que me comunique con el (¿?). Destaco que la imposibilidad de poder asentar mi reclamo en el libro de quejas es en principio un incumplimiento legal dado que la ley provincial exige que los comercios privados con atencion al publico cuenten con el mismo.

(Translated by Google)
On January 13, 2019, regarding a situation at a gas station, I requested the complaints book. I was told it was unavailable and that the person in charge was absent. I was given the phone number and contact information of the person in charge so I could get in touch with him (?). I emphasize that the inability to register my complaint in the complaints book is, in principle, a legal violation, since provincial law requires private businesses serving the public to have one.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJOTZXczRRRRAB
